shortAnswer: Vitamin D is essential for bones, the immune system, and muscles. Deficiency is very common, especially in winter. Low levels can cause fatigue and bone pain. Discuss any deficiency with your doctor before taking supplements.
metaDescription: Vitamin D too low? Normal ranges, deficiency symptoms, and when supplementation makes sense — explained simply.
doctorQuestions: How severe is my vitamin D deficiency?
What dose of vitamin D should I take?
pageTitle: Vitamin D value — 25-OH Vitamin D explained | Medyra
